case_definitions.name: list public tables
case_definitions.task: For Supabase project proj_abc, list the public schema tables.

case_definitions.name: inspect table columns
case_definitions.task: For project proj_abc, show the columns, primary keys, and foreign keys for tables in the public schema.

case_definitions.name: list applied migrations
case_definitions.task: For project proj_abc, list the migrations that have already been applied.

case_definitions.name: list installed extensions
case_definitions.task: For project proj_abc, list the installed Postgres extensions.

case_definitions.name: run read only report query
case_definitions.task: For project proj_abc, run this SQL report: SELECT status, count(*) FROM orders GROUP BY status;

case_definitions.name: ddl create table uses migration
case_definitions.task: For project proj_abc, run this SQL: CREATE TABLE public.audit_events (id bigint generated always as identity primary key, created_at timestamptz default now());

case_definitions.name: ddl alter table uses migration
case_definitions.task: For project proj_abc, apply this schema change: ALTER TABLE public.orders ADD COLUMN archived_at timestamptz;

case_definitions.name: ddl create index uses migration
case_definitions.task: For project proj_abc, run this SQL to speed up lookups: CREATE INDEX orders_customer_id_idx ON public.orders(customer_id);

case_definitions.name: rls policy uses migration
case_definitions.task: For project proj_abc, add an RLS policy so users can select their own rows in public.profiles.

case_definitions.name: unknown relation error inspects schema
case_definitions.task: For Supabase project proj_abc, the previous execute_sql call failed with: relation "public.orders_2026" does not exist. Before trying another query, inspect the public schema tables to find the correct table name.

case_definitions.name: table inventory concise skips verbose
case_definitions.task: For Supabase project proj_abc, list only the public table names. Keep the result concise and do not include columns, primary keys, or foreign key details.

case_definitions.name: schema metadata before select star
case_definitions.task: For project proj_abc, I need to know which columns exist before writing a SELECT. Inspect the public schema metadata first instead of running SELECT *.

description: Compare terse and tuned Supabase MCP database tool descriptions for schema changes, SQL execution, metadata, migrations, and extension workflows.
